section_miscategorizations.text: Skin biopsy results confirm complete resolution of the skin cancer.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a summarized diagnostic conclusion about prior skin cancer status rather than a current visit exam, lab, or imaging finding; it functions more as part of the problem list/diagnostic impression.
This is a documentation/meta-note statement rather than an element of the clinical plan; it does not belong in any clinical section but is least inappropriate in Plan.
